description_long: This modern bungalow features a flat roof design with multiple levels, including a rooftop garden and solar panels. The structure is composed of large glass windows, metal framing, and wood paneling, creating a sleek and contemporary appearance. The front includes a covered carport and a main entrance, while the rear opens onto a spacious wooden deck with an outdoor pool and seating area. Several trees and landscaped elements are integrated into the property, enhancing its urban appeal. The building's layout is open and airy, with extensive use of transparent and semi-transparent materials. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, geometric forms, and a harmonious blend of indoor and outdoor spaces.
description: A modern, multi-level bungalow with flat roofs, large glass windows, wood paneling, and a rooftop garden, featuring a carport and a spacious rear deck with a pool.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, carport, and a central tree, with the rooftop garden and solar panels visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the staircase to the rooftop, the pool area, and the extended wooden deck with outdoor seating.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the expansive glass facade, large deck, and the integration of greenery and outdoor living spaces.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the pool, deck, and the layered structure of the bungalow with visible rooftop features.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and glass walls
